meaning: 达拉斯[美国得克萨斯州东北部城市]
examples: I too dreamed of living in Dallas one day.
She booked a plane for Denver with a layover in Dallas.
This year husbands in the Dallas area might not be back by Monday morning.
Prior to MSNBC, Banfield served as the evening news anchor for KDFW-TV, the FOX affiliate in Dallas.
